name: @kampus/cf-credentials
description: The shared macOS-Keychain Cloudflare-credential seam — paste-token → validate-before-persist → Keychain, keychain-first with $CLOUDFLARE_* env fallback (#1730, ADR 0045). Originally extracted from the retired cf-utils package so every CF operator CLI (anka-ops, orphan-sweep) depends on one auth package instead of each rolling its own.
